# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls


apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  labels:
    linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-destination
  ports:
  - port: 8086
    targetPort: 8086

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-proxy-injector
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-proxy-injector
  ports:
  - port: 443
    targetPort: 8443

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-identity
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    targetPort: 8080

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-tap
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-tap
  ports:
  - port: 8088
    targetPort: 8088

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-ocp
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-ocp
  ports:
  - port: 8089
    targetPort: 8089

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-prometheus
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-prometheus
  ports:
  - port: 9090
    targetPort: 9090

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-grafana
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-grafana
  ports:
  - port: 3000
    targetPort: 3000

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-web
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-web
  ports:
  - port: 8084
    targetPort: 8084

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-controller
  ports:
  - port: 8085
    targetPort: 8085

---

kind: Service

  name: linkerd-destination
  namespace: linkerd

    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service

  name: linkerd-web
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-web
  ports:
  - port: 8084
    targetPort: 8084

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  selector:
    app: linkerd-controller
  ports:
  - port: 8085
    targetPort: 8085

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: server-1
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  port: 8080
  tls:
    mode: "strict"
  authorization:
    policy:
      name: "policy-1"
      namespace: linkerd

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: policy-1
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  rules:
  - from:
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-identity.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
      - name: "linkerd-controller.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-identity"
      - name: "linkerd-controller"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-identity"
      - name: "linkerd-controller"
    - clusters:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-proxy-injector"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-proxy-injector"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-proxy-injector.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-tap"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-tap"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-tap.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-prometheus"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-prometheus"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-prometheus.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-grafana"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-grafana"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-grafana.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-web"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-web"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-web.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-controller"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-controller"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-controller.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-destination"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-destination"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-destination.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:
      - name: "linkerd-proxy-injector"
    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-proxy-injector"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-proxy-injector.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
    - serviceAccounts:

    - workloads:
      - name: "linkerd-tap"
    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-tap.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"

    - namespaces:
      - name: "linkerd"
    - principals:
      - name: "linkerd-destination.linkerd.svc.cluster.local"
